rationale: In the citing paper, Liu and Haws (2020) appears as part of a grouped parenthetical example of prior work on portion-size research (e.g., "Prior research has focused more on the effects of portion size"). The paper does not discuss this source's specific findings, mechanisms, or measures, and it is not used to build hypotheses, justify design choices, or interpret results. This indicates a background literature-list function rather than a distinct, meaningful dependency on that specific article.
